title: Ulic Qel-Droma's mesh suit
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:UlicQelDromasMeshSuit-KOTOR2.jpg|thumb|A [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] in the armor.]]
'''Ulic Qel-Droma's mesh suit''' was a suit of medium [[Armor/Legends|armor]] that was utilized by the fallen [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Ulic Qel-Droma/Legends|Ulic Qel-Droma]] during the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]]. Qel-Droma abandoned his armor, as well as all his trappings of the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] after the [[Battle of Ossus (Great Sith War)|murder of his brother]], [[Cay Qel-Droma|Cay]]. Even so, the dark taint continued to haunt it, with the possibility of affecting whomever wore it.

==Behind the scenes==
Ulic Qel-Droma's mesh suit was intended to appear in the [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' but it was removed from the final version of the game. As the armor was still present in the game files, it could be obtained using cheat codes.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{C|Cut}}
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''
